title: useNetwork
description: Monitors network connection status, including online/offline and effective type.
summary: Tracks the user's network connection and status.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `useNetwork` works.

<UseNetworkDemosUsage />

## API References

- [`Network Information`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Network_Information_API)

## Depend On

[`useWindowEvent`](/docs/hooks/use-window-event)

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

`,(0,n.jsx)(o,{name:"use-network",code:`"use client";\r
import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
\r
interface NetworkStatus {\r
  downlink?: number;\r
  downlinkMax?: number;\r
  rtt?: number;\r
  saveData?: boolean;\r
  effectiveType?: "slow-2g" | "2g" | "3g" | "4g" | "5g";\r
  type?: "bluetooth" | "cellular" | "ethernet" | "wifi" | "wimax" | "none" | "other" | "unknown";\r
}\r
\r
function getOnlineStatus() {\r
  return typeof navigator !== "undefined" ? navigator.onLine : false;\r
}\r
\r
function getConnection(): NetworkStatus {\r
  if (typeof navigator === "undefined") return {};\r
\r
  const n = navigator as any;\r
  const connection = n.connection || n.mozConnection || n.webkitConnection;\r
\r
  if (!connection) return {};\r
\r
  return {\r
    downlink: navigator.onLine ? connection.downlink : 0,\r
    downlinkMax: navigator.onLine ? connection.downlinkMax : 0,\r
    effectiveType: navigator.onLine ? connection.effectiveType : "none",\r
    rtt: navigator.onLine ? connection.rtt : 0,\r
    saveData: navigator.onLine ? connection.saveData : false,\r
    type: navigator.onLine ? (typeof connection.type === "undefined" ? "unknown" : connection.type) : "none"\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export function useNetwork() {\r
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ online: boolean } & NetworkStatus>({\r
    online: getOnlineStatus(),\r
    ...getConnection()\r
  });\r
\r
  const updateConnectionStatus = useCallback(() => {\r
    setStatus({\r
      online: getOnlineStatus(),\r
      ...getConnection()\r
    });\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    updateConnectionStatus();\r
  }, [updateConnectionStatus]);\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("online", updateConnectionStatus);\r
  useWindowEvent("offline", updateConnectionStatus);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const n = navigator as any;\r
    const connection = n.connection || n.mozConnection || n.webkitConnection;\r
\r
    if (connection) {\r
      connection.addEventListener("change", updateConnectionStatus);\r
      return () => connection.removeEventListener("change", updateConnectionStatus);\r
    }\r
  }, [updateConnectionStatus]);\r
\r
  return status;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-network.ts"})]})}function f(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,n.jsx)(d,{...t})}):d(t)}function u(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return y(b);})();
